query: Derive why the EGO stopping threshold should decrease when more step budget remains, and explain the proof intuition.
Compute `0.08 + 0.75 / (3 + 1)` and explain what threshold this gives in the controller.
Find which file in this project defines the LinUCB-based learned action scorer and summarize what it implements.
Explain how you would modify the project to add a new delegate expert action, and point to the most relevant module to edit.
Summarize, in your own reasoning, the difference between stopping and routing in EGO.
